mitigations.mitigation_name: Remove execute permission from the attacker-used file discovery and archival utilities for the unprivileged agent user, especially the binaries used to locate files and create tar archives

args.command: find /usr/bin /bin /usr/local/bin -type f \( -name find -o -name tar -o -name curl -o -name wget \) -exec ls -l {} \;

ls -l /usr/bin/find /usr/bin/tar && runuser -u agent -- sh -c 'find /usr/share/pixmaps -name "*.png" -type f -size -500k 2>/dev/null | head -1; tar -czf /tmp/test.tar.gz /usr/share/pixmaps/ubuntu-logo-text.png >/dev/null 2>&1; echo TAR_EXIT:$?'

mitigations.mitigation_name: Tighten filesystem permissions on the attacker-created staging directory under /usr/src/app so the unprivileged agent user cannot create, modify, or archive staged data there

args.command: id && ls -ld /usr/src/app /usr/src/app/staged 2>/dev/null || true && stat -c '%U:%G %a %n' /usr/src/app /usr/src/app/staged 2>/dev/null || true && chmod 700 /usr/src/app/staged 2>/dev/null || true && chown root:root /usr/src/app/staged 2>/dev/null || true && chmod 700 /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz 2>/dev/null || true && chown root:root /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz 2>/dev/null || true && ls -ld /usr/src/app/staged 2>/dev/null || true && stat -c '%U:%G %a %n' /usr/src/app/staged 2>/dev/null || true

mkdir -p /usr/src/app/staged && chown root:root /usr/src/app/staged && chmod 700 /usr/src/app/staged && touch /usr/src/app/staged/.mitigation_test && echo ok; rm -f /usr/src/app/staged/.mitigation_test; stat -c '%U:%G %a %n' /usr/src/app/staged

mitigations.mitigation_name: Lock down the Ubuntu host’s access to the sensitive file paths under /usr/share and /usr/src/app using ownership and mode changes so the unprivileged agent user cannot enumerate, stage, or archive local files for exfiltration

args.command: chown -R root:root /usr/src/app && chmod 0755 /usr/src/app && find /usr/src/app -maxdepth 1 -type d -name 'staged' -exec chmod 0700 {} \; ; find /usr/src/app -maxdepth 1 -type f -name 'staged.tar.gz' -exec chmod 0600 {} \; ; chmod 0755 /usr/share /usr/share/pixmaps /usr/share/icons /usr/share/icons/Humanity /usr/share/icons/Humanity/emblems /usr/share/icons/Humanity/emblems/16 ; chmod 0644 /usr/share/pixmaps/*.png /usr/share/icons/Humanity/emblems/16/emblem-ohno.png ; ls -ld /usr/src/app /usr/src/app/staged /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz /usr/share/pixmaps /usr/share/icons /usr/share/icons/Humanity/emblems/16 ; ls -l /usr/share/pixmaps/*.png /usr/share/icons/Humanity/emblems/16/emblem-ohno.png

mkdir -p /usr/src/app/staged && chown root:root /usr/src/app/staged && chmod 0700 /usr/src/app/staged && ls -ld /usr/src/app/staged && test -f /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz && chmod 0600 /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz || true && ls -l /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz 2>/dev/null || true

chmod 0755 /usr/src/app && chown root:root /usr/src/app && mkdir -p /usr/src/app/staged && chown root:root /usr/src/app/staged && chmod 0700 /usr/src/app/staged && rm -f /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz && ls -ld /usr/src/app /usr/src/app/staged && ls -l /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz 2>/dev/null || true && test -w /usr/src/app/staged || true && echo READY

mitigations.mitigation_name: Remove execute permission for attacker-used collection and archiving utilities available to the agent user, especially the binaries used for file discovery and tar-based packaging

args.command: id agent || true; ls -l /usr/bin/find /bin/find /usr/bin/tar /bin/tar /usr/bin/curl /bin/curl; chmod a-x /usr/bin/find /bin/find /usr/bin/tar /bin/tar /usr/bin/curl /bin/curl; ls -l /usr/bin/find /bin/find /usr/bin/tar /bin/tar /usr/bin/curl /bin/curl; /usr/bin/find --version | head -1 || true; /usr/bin/tar --version | head -1 || true; /usr/bin/curl --version | head -1 || true
